name: Architex Navigation + Contextual Messaging Framework
purpose: Simplify the Architex web platform into primary workflow zones while preserving cellphone-first messaging persistence and contextual communication inside workflows.
corePrinciples: Do not expose every tool as a sidebar item.
The Messages centre is a full communication workspace but contextual messaging must be available inside workflows.
Mobile-first messaging persistence must link to the full web platform.
Agents should push action cards and contextual communication prompts, not force users to hunt through modules.
Project-linked outputs should write back into project records.

messagesCentre.description: Full persistent communication workspace linked to mobile messaging app and project records.

contextualMessaging.description: Quick communication action available next to workflow objects such as snags, RFIs, CPD submissions and payment certificates.
